name: Bob's Burial
blurb: Bob spends his days grazing in the cow pen near Castle Mud.

stages.description: While butchering a cow you hear a scream from the village nearby. A woman screaming hysterically about a lunatic that killed the village's beloved cow bob!
Robert told me a farmer in the south west saw bob's killing happen. And apparently made a sketch of the killer.
I have the suspect sketch. I should throw it into a well before anyone sees it.
